name: PaySpace (Deel Local Payroll, powered by PaySpace)

Compliance.description: Automatic SARS compliance, POPIA/GDPR/LGPD compliant, ISO 27001 first in Africa for payroll, SOC1/2, no regulatory issues found, Deel backing. Excellent track record.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Mixed: HelloPeter 2.33/5 (3 recent: 2 poor support, 1 excellent); high elsewhere (Trustpilot 4.6/5, SelectHub 98/100). Positive on ease/use, negative recent support.

Product Value.description: Scalable value, transparent per-emp pricing, broad features/HR add-ons, strong for SA/multi-country but no exact ZAR. High value.

Innovation.description: Cloud-native real-time payroll, WhatsApp ESS, API integrations (Workday/Xero), AI mentions, auto legislative updates, Deel acquisition expands to 45+ countries.

Customer Support.description: Praised in most reviews (prompt, excellent), but recent HelloPeter complaints on slow/no response, unclear escalation. NPS 97 claimed.

Accessibility & Security.description: Strong security with ISO 27001:2022 certification, SOC 1/2 compliance, POPIA/GDPR/LGPD, data residency options (SA/EU), 2FA/SSO, annual audits, penetration testing.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Pay-per-employee/month (no annual fees); Lite/Premier/Master plans; no specific ZAR listed

socialSentiment.summary: No recent X posts found; review sites mixed recent (HelloPeter low, others high)
